languages.text: {n}Батошски задумчиво почесывает бороду.{/n} "Устав гласит, что "вокс-станции", как вы сказали, используют для связи между полками. Мой дед говорил, что видел остов последней такой в этом мире, но потом его поглотили корни. Так что "вокс-станции" у нас нет".

{n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "The Handbook says 'vox-stations,' as you call them, are for inter-regimental communication. My grandfather said he saw the casing of the last one on this world, but the roots swallowed it long ago. So, we have no 'vox-station' here."
languages.original_text: {n}Батошски задумчиво почесывает бороду.{/n} "Устав гласит, что "вокс-станции", как вы сказали, используют для связи между полками. Мой дед говорил, что видел остов последней такой в этом мире, но потом его поглотили корни. Так что "вокс-станции" у нас нет".

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "The Code says 'vox-stations,' as you call them, are for inter-regimental communication. My grandfather said he saw the hull of the last one on this world, but the roots swallowed it long ago. So, we have no 'vox-station' here."

{n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "The Code says 'vox-stations,' as you call them, are for inter-regimental communication. My grandfather said he saw the casing of the last one on this world, but the roots swallowed it long ago. So, we have no 'vox-station' here."

"Your voxes aren't working?" {n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "It must be the Drover's screeching. Well, even if it wasn't that — taking off or landing in the vicinity is unlikely to happen. You've already tried."

{n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "The Code says 'vox-stations,' as you call them, are for inter-regimental communication. My grandfather said he saw the hull of the last one on this world, but the roots swallowed it long ago. So, we have no 'vox-station' here."

{n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "The Code says 'vox-stations,' as you call them, are for inter-regimental communication. My grandfather said he saw the casing of the last one on this world, but the roots swallowed it long ago. So, we have no 'vox-station' here."

{n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "The Handbook says 'vox-stations,' as you call them, are for inter-regimental communication. My grandfather said he saw the casing of the last one on this world, but the roots swallowed it long ago. So, we have no 'vox-station' here."

languages.text: 「あなたのボイスが働かないの？」{n}バトシュスキーは考えながらひげを掻く。{/n}「ドローバーの叫び声でだろう。でも、それが原因じゃなかったとしても―その周辺で離着陸するなんてことは起こらないだろう。もう試しただろう」
languages.original_text: "Your voxes aren't working?" {n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "It must be the Drover's screeching. Well, even if it wasn't that — taking off or landing in the vicinity is unlikely to happen. You've already tried."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたのボイスが働かないの？」{n}バトシュスキーは考えながらひげを掻く。「ドローバーの叫び声でだろう。でも、それが原因じゃなかったとしても―その周辺で離着陸するなんてことは起こらないだろう。もう試しただろう。」

languages.text: {n}Batoshski kratzt sich gedankenverloren an seinem Bart.{/n} "Laut Handbuch dienen 'Voxstationen', wie Ihr sie nennt, der Kommunikation innerhalb des Regiments. Mein Großvater sagte, er hätte das Gehäuse der letzten Station auf dieser Welt gesehen, aber es wurde schon vor langer Zeit von den Wurzeln verschlungen. Wir haben hier also keine 'Voxstation'."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "The Handbook says 'vox-stations,' as you call them, are for inter-regimental communication. My grandfather said he saw the casing of the last one on this world, but the roots swallowed it long ago. So, we have no 'vox-station' here."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski kratzt sich gedankenverloren an seinem Bart.{/n} "Laut Handbuch dienen 'Voxstationen', wie Ihr sie nennt, der Kommunikation innerhalb des Regiments. Mein Großvater sagte, er hätte das Gehäuse der letzten Station auf dieser Welt gesehen, aber es wurde schon vor langer Zeit von den Wurzeln verschlungen. Wir haben hier also keine 'Voxstation'."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski se gratte la tête d'un air songeur.{/n} « D'après le Manuel, les "postes-vox", comme vous les appelez, sont réservés aux communications entre régiments. Mon grand-père prétendait avoir vu le boîtier du dernier exemplaire en circulation sur ce monde, mais les racines l'ont englouti depuis longtemps. Alors, pour répondre à votre question, non, nous n'avons pas de "poste-vox". »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "The Handbook says 'vox-stations,' as you call them, are for inter-regimental communication. My grandfather said he saw the casing of the last one on this world, but the roots swallowed it long ago. So, we have no 'vox-station' here."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski se gratte la tête d'un air songeur.{/n} « D'après le Manuel, les "postes-vox", comme vous les appelez, sont réservés aux communications entre régiments. Mon grand-père prétendait avoir vu le boîtier du dernier exemplaire en circulation sur ce monde, mais les racines l'ont englouti depuis longtemps. Alors, pour répondre à votre question, non, nous n'avons pas de "poste-vox". »

languages.text: {n}Batoshski se rasca la barba, pensativo.{/n} «Según el manual, eso que llama "estaciones de voco" sirve para comunicarse en el regimiento. Mi abuelo dijo que vio la carcasa de la última de ellas, pero las raíces se la tragaron hace mucho. Así que no, no tenemos una "estación de voco"».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "The Handbook says 'vox-stations,' as you call them, are for inter-regimental communication. My grandfather said he saw the casing of the last one on this world, but the roots swallowed it long ago. So, we have no 'vox-station' here."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski se rasca la barba, pensativo.{/n} «Según el manual, eso que llama "estaciones de voco" sirve para comunicarse en el regimiento. Mi abuelo dijo que vio la carcasa de la última de ellas, pero las raíces se la tragaron hace mucho. Así que no, no tenemos una "estación de voco"».

languages.text: {n}Batoshski, düşünceli bir şekilde sakalını kaşıyor.{/n} "El Kitabı, sizin tabirinizle 'voks istasyonlarının' alaylar arası iletişim için olduğunu söyler. Büyükbabam, bu dünyadaki son voks istasyonunun muhafazasını gördüğünü söylerdi. İstasyonun kendisiniyse kökler onu uzun zaman önce yutmuş. Yani burada 'voks istasyonumuz' yok."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "The Handbook says 'vox-stations,' as you call them, are for inter-regimental communication. My grandfather said he saw the casing of the last one on this world, but the roots swallowed it long ago. So, we have no 'vox-station' here."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski, düşünceli bir şekilde sakalını kaşıyor.{/n} "El Kitabı, sizin tabirinizle 'voks istasyonlarının' alaylar arası iletişim için olduğunu söyler. Büyükbabam, bu dünyadaki son voks istasyonunun muhafazasını gördüğünü söylerdi. İstasyonun kendisiniyse kökler onu uzun zaman önce yutmuş. Yani burada 'voks istasyonumuz' yok."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基挠着胡子思索道：{/n}“你们说的那个‘音阵通讯站’，《手册》里说是团级部队之间用来通讯的。我爷爷说他见过这世界上最后一台通讯站的外壳，但早被那些根系吞掉了。所以我们这儿没有‘音阵通讯站。”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "The Handbook says 'vox-stations,' as you call them, are for inter-regimental communication. My grandfather said he saw the casing of the last one on this world, but the roots swallowed it long ago. So, we have no 'vox-station' here."
